Hisense Error Codes - Complete Fix Guide

Find and fix your Hisense appliance error codes. Updated for 2024-2025 models.

Washing Machine Codes

CodeProblemFix
E1Water inlet issueCheck water supply, clean inlet valve
E2Drain problemClean drain hose, check pump
E3Water overflowCheck water valve, level sensor
UEUnbalanced loadRedistribute clothes evenly

Dishwasher Codes

CodeProblemFix
E1Water leak detectedCheck for leaks, level sensor
E2Drainage issueClean filter, check drain hose
E3Heating problemCheck heating element, thermostat

Air Conditioner Codes

CodeProblemFix
E1Room temperature sensorReplace sensor
E2Evaporator sensorCheck sensor, wiring
E3Condenser dirtyClean condenser coil
E4Compressor issueCheck compressor, refrigerant
